description: Kong API Gateway monitoring dashboard using metrics from the Kong Prometheus plugin collected via the OpenTelemetry Collector.
title: Kong Gateway Monitoring

widgets.description: Total HTTP requests handled by Kong across all services and routes.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Current number of active client connections to Kong's Nginx server.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND state = 'active'

widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Whether Kong's datastore (PostgreSQL or Cassandra) is reachable. 1 = reachable, 0 = unreachable.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Datastore Reachable

widgets.description: HTTP request rate broken down by Kong service.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Rate by Service

widgets.description: Health status of upstream targets. Shows healthy, unhealthy, and DNS error states.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Upstream Target Health

widgets.description: HTTP request rate grouped by response status code. Helps identify error spikes.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Rate by Status Code

widgets.description: Request throughput per Kong route.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Rate by Route

widgets.description: Distribution of incoming request body sizes.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Size

widgets.description: Distribution of outgoing response body sizes.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Response Size

widgets.description: Average end-to-end request latency including Kong processing and upstream response time.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Latency (avg)

widgets.description: Average time spent waiting for upstream service responses, excluding Kong processing.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Upstream Latency (avg)

widgets.description: Time spent in Kong processing (plugins, routing). Calculated as request latency minus upstream latency.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name
namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Kong Processing Latency

widgets.description: Rate of server error responses (status 500-599) indicating upstream or Kong failures.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND code >= '500'

widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate

widgets.description: Rate of client error responses (status 400-499) such as auth failures or not found.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND code >= '400' AND code < '500'

widgets.title: 4xx Error Rate

widgets.description: Total error rate per service combining all non-2xx responses.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND code >= '400'

widgets.title: Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: Count of upstream targets in unhealthy or DNS error state.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND state != 'healthy'

widgets.title: Upstream Unhealthy Targets

widgets.description: Incoming network traffic volume to Kong.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND direction = 'ingress'

widgets.title: Ingress Bandwidth

widgets.description: Outgoing network traffic volume from Kong to clients.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND direction = 'egress'

widgets.title: Egress Bandwidth

widgets.description: Nginx connection states: active, reading, writing, and waiting.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Connection States

widgets.description: Combined ingress and egress bandwidth per service.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Total Bandwidth by Service

widgets.description: Request throughput attributed to specific Kong plugins.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Rate by Plugin

widgets.description: Additional latency introduced by Kong plugins during request processing.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Plugin Latency Impact

widgets.description: Error responses correlated with Kong plugin execution.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND code >= '500'

widgets.title: Plugin Error Rate

widgets.description: Total number of Nginx worker connections across all states.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Nginx Worker Connections

widgets.description: Kong shared memory zone usage for caching, rate limiting, and other plugin data.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Shared Memory Usage

widgets.description: Memory used by Kong's Lua worker processes.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service IN $service AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Lua Worker Memory
